# `mise bin-paths`

- **Usage**: `mise bin-paths [--bin-names] [-J --json] [TOOL@VERSION]…`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/bin_paths.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/bin_paths.rs)

List all the active runtime bin paths

## Arguments

### `[TOOL@VERSION]…`

Tool(s) to look up
e.g.: ruby@3

## Flags

### `--bin-names`

Output executable names instead of bin directories

### `-J --json`

Output executable entries in JSON format (implies --bin-names)
